metadata.title: Refresh adoption CI template
metadata.description: Adds the current setup-bun step to the readable adopter template.

files.patch:
@@ -24,7 +24,10 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       # Adoption templates intentionally use readable mutable tags.
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      # The factory's own workflows are SHA-pinned; these templates are copied by adopters
+      # and test/ci-templates.test.ts locks the mutable-tag convention.
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
         with:
           bun-version: "1.3.0"
       - run: bun run src/cli.ts run --provider github --runtime "$AI_REVIEW_DRY_RUN_RUNTIME"
